horoscope: Transits today bring out your desire to be the best you can be, dear Aries, and they encourage a sense that you have the freedom to do more. You could enjoy good humor and a form of relief from stress. It's a powerful time for personal charm, romance, imagination, and creativity, with Venus, the goddess of love, not only transiting your romance and creativity sector, but also in a positive aspect to Neptune in your sign! It's a wonderful aspect, and the very best way to harness this energy is to draw on your gentlest traits and express them without apology. Venus attracts rather than pursues, making this a strong time for magnetizing good things, people, attention, and situations into your life. This is a time for fully recognizing inner values. Boundaries between you and others tend to soften, and bonds can strengthen.

There is a general spirit of cooperation around you today, dear Taurus, even if there's perhaps some tension brewing. Interactions are mutually beneficial and supportive, and it's easy to connect with people who share similar interests or ideas. If you need to repair a relationship, this is a good time to take a step to do so. Seeing both sides of the story is at the heart of this. Good energy is with you for family, home, relationship, and pleasure matters, and it's a fine time to spend with people you love. Forgiveness or simply getting beyond problem areas in relationships comes more readily than usual today, and it's healing for your soul. There can be a focus on sharing memories, sentimentality, and compassion. You're supporting loved ones or they you, and you're more generous than usual with your time and energy. You might put extra effort into improving or balancing the atmosphere, ambiance, or decor in your home, or you might go the extra mile to make things easier and more peaceful with loved ones. It's also a good time for personal reflection.

You might enjoy healthier or at least kinder communications with others, dear Gemini, making it a great time to reach out and make that connection that you may have been considering. People are seeing you as approachable and friendly. Transits today enhance your personal charm. You could be feeling emotionally and soulfully connected to people now. Your need for harmony and peace is in strong form, and you're picking up the subtlest of moves and gestures, and enjoying what you're seeing! Feelings that you haven't fully acknowledged can be discovered now. Communications flow, and there is understanding even if the words are not perfect. Today is good for relating, connecting, and expressing yourself in unusual and satisfying ways.

You have balanced Venus moving through your sector of money, values, and comfort, dear Cancer, and connecting with your wants and needs comes naturally during this cycle. Today, there is even more art and creativity added to the equation, and you are likely to have a stronger sense of how to fill the empty spaces. You are certainly appreciating the finer things in life, and your aesthetic sense is fully developed. It is also a strong time for bringing intuition and imagination to your financial and business affairs. There can be almost magical discoveries and conclusions now, and possibly some good finds and deals for things that greatly improve your life. It can be a good day for hopeful and helpful conversations, as well as finding the information you need. The Moon in your sign all day keeps you emotionally engaged and involved.

Venus in your sign is a nice boost all around, dear Leo, and is especially the case when it connects well with other planets as it does now. Your most appealing traits are in the spotlight! People see the gentleness in you more readily, and you can be a little more approachable as a result. Your more idealistic and romantic side seems to come out to play with Neptune involved as a long-term guest in your sector of spirit, adventure, travel, and life goals. You could easily find yourself dreaming of beautiful things and places. Opportunities for cooperation and shared happiness seem more evident with your current mood. Your compassion meters go way up, making it a great time to forgive and heal. Healing and replenishing activities are most appropriate now, and you tend to find them quite easily. Take notes if you come up with an unusual idea.

These days, Venus keeps your eye on the past or private life when it comes to love, affection, and pleasure, dear Virgo. Today, Venus receives an enhancing aspect from dreamy Neptune and is parallel Jupiter, bringing powerful energy for coming to terms with something from the past, particularly related to a relationship. You may arrive at new insight or understanding, and you tend to see things in a more sympathetic light than usual. The release of a problem can be especially relieving and beneficial now. There is more graciousness in relationships, and you have a special love of helping and facilitating others in positive ways right now.

You're in particularly good shape in your relationships today, dear Libra, or you're seeing people and your feelings in a good light. Ideally, you're not glossing over others' flaws but seeing them and finding beauty in them. The former is a tendency when Venus and Neptune form a challenging aspect, and the latter is more likely when a harmonious aspect is formed between the two bodies, as they do today. There is a nurturing, accepting theme to the day, which is a welcome break from the usual. Friends and partners harmonize well now, or there is a spirit of friendship in a partnership. Interactions can be markedly smooth, flowing, and pleasing. There is a recognition that inner needs are as important as outer needs, if not more, and you may see previously overlooked possibilities as you recognize them. There is a nice sense that you have the opportunity or incentive to accomplish things you never thought possible.

There can be especially good feelings about a special person in your life, a project, or a current situation today, dear Scorpio, and you're feeling generous. It's a wonderful time for feeling comfortable, at ease, and content. Venus harmonizes with fantastical, dreamy, and creative Neptune and forms a parallel with gracious, happy Jupiter. These influences enhance your gentler qualities, as well as your natural artistic sense. Feelings may not quite be out in the open, but you are a little more approachable anyhow, and the added layer of mystery can actually leave others wanting more. People tend to think very highly of you, and you are taking the lead quietly. It's also a good time for all things career and work, although not in the most obvious and concrete sense, as it's more about a special flair and intuition for making the right choices at the moment. These transits boost your charm, particularly with the public or in professional settings. Freedom of spirit is most important now, and opportunities to make more money or to improve your enjoyment of your work could emerge.

You have special energy working in your favor today, dear Sagittarius, with lovely Venus parallel your ruler, Jupiter, and harmonizing with Neptune in sister Fire signs. These influences enhance your appeal, strengthen your relationships, and improve your ability to express yourself creatively or romantically. You're more compassionate, helpful, generous, and gracious, and others tend to receive you especially well. Being yourself is your selling point. Healing yourself is also a strong possibility, because as you forgive and accept, you are doing yourself a huge favor. Today's transits add magic to your mystique and support your romantic, intuitive, and creative side. There can be a feeling of unburdening, letting go of negative things or thoughts, and enjoying others.

Strong energy is with you today for feeling loved and giving love, dear Capricorn. You might discover how to control a part of yourself that previously controlled you, and this can boost your confidence. You could connect with someone who shares your interests or with whom you feel comfortable discussing your pet interests and ideas. You may be getting to a place of calm or understanding on a matter, and this feels great. You appreciate a cooperative and open-minded atmosphere around you. You might arrive at innovative solutions for problems related to home, family, debt, and support quite intuitively. It's a time to enjoy, accept, and embrace your deeper feelings and desires. With a more relaxed and creative approach to your life, opportunities to grow and improve open up. You're ready to entertain even the most unusual of feelings. Sometimes, we need to forgive ourselves and move on, and this kind of thing is especially favored today. Self-understanding comes more easily, and so does your ability to connect intimately with someone. There can be a pleasing focus on inner needs and wants today.

A close connection can be surprising, pleasant, and prosperous right now, dear Aquarius. Opening up to others somehow invites more opportunities into your life. There is more generosity and a spirit of goodwill in your interactions now that can be especially pleasing. There can be a pleasant feeling of growth or improvement in a relationship, with money matters, or with studies today. The atmosphere could be right for releasing a burden or healing a grievance if it would benefit you. Love is more gracious than usual today, and others see you in a very favorable light, making it a good day to express your feelings, give interviews, and share your ideas. There is an extra touch of magic in your interactions today, and discussing your dreams can be part of this.

You're seeing both sides of a situation, and there is generally an air of fair play and reasonableness around you today, dear Pisces. There's also a bit of mystery, and it's the pleasant kind. Bonding or enjoying a mood boost stemming from acceptance and understanding can figure strongly. You're also in good shape for intuition and imagination applied to practical matters. Your sixth sense can lead you to a useful method or technique for your work, a new business or money-making idea, or a creative approach to a health problem. You are especially willing and open to helping others. A sense of inner joy and peace can be with you as you find more meaning in what you're doing.
